dashboard.platform_overview: Here's an overview of your platform. {{userCount}} active users across {{orgCount}} organizations.

users.title: Users
users.description: Manage platform users and their roles
users.search_placeholder: Search by name, email or username...

actions.reset_password_link_copied: Password reset link for {{name}} copied to clipboard
actions.delete_confirmation: Are you sure you want to delete user {{name}}? This action cannot be undone.

users.no_users: No users in the system yet

organizations.title: Organizations
organizations.description: Manage platform organizations and their limits
organizations.no_orgs: No organizations in the system yet

actions.transfer_confirmation: Are you sure you want to transfer ownership of this organization? This action cannot be undone.

sections.registration_desc: Control who can create accounts and resources on the platform

labels.registration_enabled_desc: When disabled, only admins can create new user accounts via invitations
labels.default_org_desc: New users will automatically join this organization instead of creating their own. Leave empty to require org creation on signup.
labels.default_org_none_desc: New users will need to create their own organization on signup
labels.allow_org_creation_desc: When disabled, only Super Admins can create new organizations. Users will be assigned to the default organization.
labels.allow_workspace_creation_desc: When disabled, only Organization Owners and Managers can create workspaces.
labels.allow_project_creation_desc: When disabled, only Workspace Managers and above can create projects.
labels.sso_enabled_desc: Allow users to log in with an external identity provider
labels.sso_desc: Configure OpenID Connect for external authentication
labels.sso_provider_name_desc: Shown on the login button, e.g., 'Login with Authentik'
labels.sso_client_id_desc: OAuth2 client ID from your identity provider
labels.sso_auto_register_desc: When enabled, new users can be created through SSO even if public registration is disabled
labels.smtp_from_desc: The sender email address for outgoing emails
labels.smtp_desc: Configure outgoing email settings for notifications and password resets
labels.redirect_uri_desc: Add this URL as the redirect/callback URI in your identity provider settings.
labels.test_connection_desc: Verify SMTP server is reachable and credentials are valid
labels.readonly_env_desc: This value is set via environment variable and cannot be changed here.

warnings.no_org_creation_or_default: Organization creation is disabled with no default organization set
warnings.no_org_creation_or_default_desc: New users will be unable to proceed after signup. Set a default organization above or enable organization creation below.

common.try_adjusting: Try adjusting your search or filters
